series_metadata.series_description: ALC 83, ALC 83 A1-c, ALC 36, ALC 37, ALC 200, ALC 210 and ALC 84. This form and all schedules, related documentation, correspondence, associated reports and cross checks shows: (1) The amount of beer and malt beverages produced and sold in Ohio, shipped into Ohio or imported into Ohio from outside the United States and the resulting tax liability to be paid. (2) The quantity of wine, mixed beverages and cider sold to Cuyahoga county retailers or sold at retail within Cuyahoga county. (3) Quantity of wine produced and/or bottled and bottled wine imported into Ohio and the resulting tax liability to be paid. (4) The amount of beer and malt beverages sold to Cuyahoga county beer retailers or sold at retail within Cuyahoga county. (5) submitted by all beer and malt beverage taxpayers anticipating a tax liability in the next immediate month.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: end of calendar year in which return was filed. If scanned, . ; Electronic: end of calendar year in which return was filed
